messages.content: 润色如下内容：I’ve been interested in bilingual corporate communication for a long time. Therefore, I joined 4A company after graduation and was basically responsible for the marketing strategic planning work of the skin care lines of Dior, Lancome, and other international fashion brands. I was committed to serving international daily cosmetics, luxury goods, and FMCG brand activities, and was responsible for all-media advertising forms. My rich work experience has made me proficient in advertising planning and able to lead my team to complete various tasks efficiently.

I have had a longstanding interest in bilingual corporate communication, which led me to join the 4A company upon graduation. In this role, I primarily handled marketing strategic planning for the skincare lines of renowned international fashion brands such as Dior and Lancome. Additionally, I dedicated myself to serving various international daily cosmetics, luxury goods, and FMCG brand activities, with a focus on all-media advertising forms. 

My extensive work experience has honed my skills in advertising planning, enabling me to proficiently lead my team in efficiently accomplishing diverse tasks.

润色如下内容：I have had a longstanding interest in cosmetics, which led me to join the 4A company upon graduation, where I primarily handled marketing strategic planning for the skincare lines of renowned international fashion brands such as Dior and Lancome.

I have always been passionate about cosmetics, which is why I chose to join the 4A company after graduating. In my role there, I focused on marketing strategic planning for the skincare lines of renowned international fashion brands like Dior and Lancome.

润色如下内容：I’ve been interested in cosmetics for a long time. Therefore, I joined 4A company after graduation and was basically responsible for the marketing strategic planning work of skin care lines of Dior, Lancome and other international fashion brands. I was committed to serving international daily cosmetics, luxury goods and FMCG brand activities, and responsible for all-media advertising forms. Rich work experience has made me proficient in advertising planning and able to lead my team to complete various tasks efficiently. This is where my motivation and confidence to apply for this programme lie. I want to perceive this industry from a broader perspective, develop a more professional mindset and vision, and be able to become a backbone of advertising and marketing planning in the future.

I have had a long-standing interest in cosmetics, which is what motivated me to join the 4A company after graduation. In my role, I took on the responsibility of marketing strategic planning for the skincare lines of international fashion brands such as Dior and Lancome. I was dedicated to serving international daily cosmetics, luxury goods, and FMCG brand activities, and was responsible for various forms of all-media advertising.

My extensive work experience in advertising planning has made me proficient in this area and equipped me with the skills to lead my team in efficiently completing various tasks. It is this experience and expertise that motivate and give me the confidence to pursue this programme. I want to gain a broader perspective of the industry, develop a more professional mindset and vision, and ultimately become a pillar in advertising and marketing planning in the future.

润色如下内容：I’ve been interested in cosmetics for a long time. Therefore, I joined 4A company after graduation and was basically responsible for the marketing strategic planning work of skin care lines of Dior, Lancome and other international fashion brands. I was committed to serving international daily cosmetics, luxury goods and FMCG brand activities, and responsible for all-media advertising forms. Rich work experience has made me proficient in advertising planning and able to lead my team to complete various tasks efficiently.

Due to my long-standing passion for cosmetics, I made the decision to join the 4A company immediately after graduating. In this role, my main responsibility was marketing strategic planning for the skincare lines of prestigious international fashion brands like Dior and Lancome. I devoted myself to serving the needs of international daily cosmetics, luxury goods, and FMCG brand activities, taking charge of various forms of all-media advertising campaigns. 

My extensive work experience has allowed me to develop a high level of proficiency in advertising planning, enabling me to effectively lead my team in the successful completion of diverse tasks.

中译英：在Avnet Technology Limited，我作为产品经理期间，主要成果有：
1， 负责IDT 期间，产品线revenue从$8M成长到$40M
2， 负责Intersil 期间，主导协调开发TOF solution，在无人机，机器人等领域都有广泛的应用。
3， 负责Microchip期间，产品线业绩从每年$18M成长到$30M。

During my time as a Product Manager at Avnet Technology Limited, I achieved the following major accomplishments:

1. While overseeing the IDT product line, I successfully grew the revenue from $8M to $40M.
2. As the lead coordinator for the Intersil product line, I spearheaded the development and coordination of TOF solutions, resulting in extensive applications in areas such as unmanned aerial vehicles and robotics.
3. While in charge of the Microchip product line, I achieved significant growth, increasing annual revenue from $18M to $30M.

润色如下内容：During my time as a Product Manager at Avnet Technology Limited, I achieved the following major accomplishments:

1. While overseeing the IDT product line, I successfully grew the revenue from $8M to $40M.
2. As the lead coordinator for the Intersil product line, I spearheaded the development and coordination of TOF solutions, resulting in extensive applications in areas such as unmanned aerial vehicles and robotics.
3. While in charge of the Microchip product line, I achieved significant growth, increasing annual revenue from $18M to $30M.

During my tenure as a Product Manager at Avnet Technology Limited, I accomplished the following noteworthy achievements:

1. Under my supervision of the IDT product line, I significantly increased revenue from $8M to $40M.
2. As the lead coordinator for the Intersil product line, I played a pivotal role in developing and coordinating TOF solutions, which found widespread applications in various sectors including unmanned aerial vehicles and robotics.
3. Managing the Microchip product line, I successfully drove substantial growth, raising annual revenue from $18M to $30M.
中译英：在武汉大学的学业成绩表现出色，以优秀的成绩，连续3年获得学院的奖学金，以表彰我在本专业的卓越表现。大学期间也积极参与各项比赛，获得了相关竞赛的奖项，例如XXXXXX,取得XX等奖。

I have excelled in my academic performance at Wuhan University, consistently achieving outstanding grades and receiving the college scholarship for three consecutive years in recognition of my exceptional performance in my major. During my time in university, I actively participated in various competitions and received accolades such as the XXXXXX competition, where I achieved the XX prize.

润色如下内容：I have excelled in my academic performance at Wuhan University, consistently achieving outstanding grades and receiving the college scholarship for three consecutive years in recognition of my exceptional performance in my major. During my time in university, I actively participated in various competitions and received accolades such as the XXXXXX competition, where I achieved the XX prize.

During my academic journey at Wuhan University, my performance has been remarkable, consistently exceeding expectations and earning me the prestigious college scholarship for three consecutive years, in recognition of my exceptional achievements in my field of study. Additionally, I actively engaged in various competitions during my university years, garnering accolades such as the XX prize in the distinguished XXXXXX competition.
中译英：我将积极推进香港与国际的合作项目，提高香港电子元件产业的竞争力和创新能力。通过参与创新项目和学习计划，我将不断提升自身专业知识和技能，为香港的科技创新注入新的动力，为香港经济增长和科技进步做出持续贡献。

I will actively drive collaborative projects between Hong Kong and the international community, aiming to enhance the competitiveness and innovation capabilities of the electronic components industry in Hong Kong. By engaging in innovative projects and learning programs, I will continuously enhance my professional knowledge and skills, injecting new momentum into technological innovation in Hong Kong. I am committed to making sustained contributions to the economic growth and technological advancement of Hong Kong.

润色如下内容：I will actively drive collaborative projects between Hong Kong and the international community, aiming to enhance the competitiveness and innovation capabilities of the electronic components industry in Hong Kong. By engaging in innovative projects and learning programs, I will continuously enhance my professional knowledge and skills, injecting new momentum into technological innovation in Hong Kong. I am committed to making sustained contributions to the economic growth and technological advancement of Hong Kong.

I am dedicated to actively promoting collaborative projects between Hong Kong and the international community, with the goal of boosting the competitiveness and innovation capabilities of the electronic components industry in Hong Kong. Through active involvement in innovative projects and continuous participation in relevant learning programs, I will consistently enhance both my professional knowledge and skills. By doing so, I aim to contribute to the dynamic technological innovation landscape in Hong Kong, fostering sustained economic growth and technological advancement in the region.
中译英：我曾获得"杰出产品经理奖"：该奖项每年评选一次，共10人，由专门成立的评审委员会根据卓越的项目成果、创新性的产品改进、高效的团队管理、客户关系的建立和维护、以及对公司整体成功的贡献，在公司全球事业部内评选。

I have been the recipient of the "Outstanding Product Manager Award." This award is presented annually and is given to only 10 individuals. A dedicated judging committee evaluates the nominees based on their exceptional project accomplishments, innovative product improvements, efficient team management, establishment and maintenance of customer relationships, and overall contributions to the success of the company's global divisions.

润色如下内容：I have been the recipient of the “Outstanding Product Manager Award.” This award is presented annually and is given to only 10 individuals. A dedicated judging committee evaluates the nominees based on their exceptional project accomplishments, innovative product improvements, efficient team management, establishment and maintenance of customer relationships, and overall contributions to the success of the company’s global divisions.

I am honored to have received the prestigious "Outstanding Product Manager Award." This esteemed recognition is bestowed upon only 10 individuals each year. An esteemed judging committee meticulously evaluates the nominees, considering their exceptional achievements in project management, innovative product enhancements, effective team leadership, establishment and nurturing of customer relationships, and overall contributions to the success of the company's global divisions.
